case_title: TENGIZ IOSEBASHVILI VS. ARNOLD J. BROCKINGTON

docket_entries.description: SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED ANF FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOSEBASHVILI, TENGIZ DBA ROYAL LOAN CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKINGTON, ARNOLD J.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IOSEBASHVILI, TENGIZ DBA ROYAL LOAN CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKINGTON, ARNOLD J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IOSEBASHVILI, TENGIZ DBA ROYAL LOAN CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROCKINGTON, ARNOLD J. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET ITS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT IT COMPLIED WITH ALL OF THE PROVISIONS OF THE REES LEVERING MOTOR VEHICLE SALES AND FINANCE ACT, CIVIL CODE SECTION 2981-2984.6. IN ADDITION IT IS QUESTIONABLE WHETHER THIS COURT HAS VENUE SINCE THERE IS A MANDATORY ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN THE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,543.07 FILED BY IOSEBASHVILI, TENGIZ DBA ROYAL LOAN CO. AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKINGTON, ARNOLD J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM HOLLI THIER FILED BY IOSEBASHVILI, TENGIZ DBA ROYAL LOAN CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROCKINGTON, ARNOLD J.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: HOLLI THIER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
